data.description:
## Why
R1's capability probe needs pass-2 verification support: a dedicated asserted_capability_confirmed sub-answer lets the verifier refute capability claims with evidence instead of overloading no_viable_alternative_explanation. The kernel vocabulary is SHARED with code-review, so this is the epic's highest-blast-radius change and sits behind the strictest gates.

## What
Add the asserted_capability_confirmed sub-answer to the review_kernel pass-2 verification vocabulary, answered by the agentic verifier only for the G6/E4/T3 cohort (na elsewhere), consumed by plan-review decision math. Implement ONLY if E5 passes (byte-identical code-review corpus replay, na outside cohort) AND E6 passes (Fleiss kappa >=0.6 on 3-vote self-consistency). Bump IMPACT_MODEL_VERSION (plan-v3) per ADR 0036 so calibration corpora never pool across the vocabulary change. Incorporated directly into the packaged kernel on pass.

## Scope
- src/rebar/llm/review_kernel/ (verification model + decide math) + plan-review verify rubric + output schema.
- src/rebar/llm/plan_review/sidecar.py (version bump + lossless persistence of the new sub-answer).
- Sequenced AFTER the floor-split story (large-sleepful-needlefish) - both touch kernel decide + sidecar; the floor split may itself bump the version, in which case this composes into the same bump train.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Gate-row evidence committed before landing: E5 byte-identical replay artifact (empty decision diff, na outside G6/E4/T3) and E6 kappa >=0.6 writeup.
- [ ] IMPACT_MODEL_VERSION is bumped in the same change; sidecars persist the new sub-answer losslessly, pinned by test.
- [ ] Code-review behavior is pinned unchanged by a regression test (the E5 replay driver run as a unit-level fixture check).
- [ ] Landed directly in the packaged kernel (no config flag); docs/plan-review-gate.md + docs/event-schema.md (if sidecar shape changes) updated.
- [ ] If either gate leg fails, the story closes deferred with the failing numbers recorded.
data.title: R5: asserted_capability_confirmed kernel sub-answer (gated on E5+E6, version bump)
